features: Premium Essential Oil: Sophisticated and alluring, subtle yet intense, orchid blossom is a mysterious blend of ylang blossom, patchouli and musk that is sure to captivate anyone's attention. High-quality diffuser oil pamper all your senses and allow you to swim on an aromatic journey.

Thoughtful Packaging: Don't be afraid of sticky hands when you take out liquids, our aromatherapy oil come in high-quality amber glass bottles and come with a diffusion dropper for easy transfer of liquids as soon as you pick them up. The tight-fitting lid prevents odors, liquid leakage, and dust ingress.

Relax and Calm: Take out the diffuser, add a few drops of aromatherapy essential oil, and the enchanting scent will fill the room and you will no longer be anxious and tired. It can also be used for bathing, massage, hair care, etc, giving you the most relaxing enjoyment. At the end of the day, you fall asleep to a sweet sleep in the long-lasting scent.

Versatile: Unleash your creativity with our aromatherapy oils, whether it's soaps, scented candles, skin care, bath products, or anything else, will give you a good DIY experience, to create your own line of essential oils!

The Ideal Gift: Gorgeous box, Delicate amber glass bottle, and a handy dropper, what a beautiful and practical gift! Whether it's Christmas, Father's Day, Mother's Day, Valentine's Day, or a birthday, your loved ones, loved ones, and friends will be happy to receive this gift.
